positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a roaring celestial lion, positioned centrally and bursting with stylized cosmic energy. The lion's mane is composed of swirling nebula dust, constellations, and geometric arcs, set against a deep midnight indigo and ethereal gold gradient background. The style must be clean, highly detailed, high-contrast vector art, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on sharp silhouettes, symmetrical balance, and a limited, bold color palette of teal, gold, and navy. Isolated subject, vector graphic, clean lines, flat graphic design, poster art composition.
